creator: takeharu1219@ybb.ne.jp
text:
According to output of sysctl commands, following cpu freq-levels are 
	reported on my CF-R7 note book(see cf-r7-sysctl.txt.gz in detail).

	1)  1201 Mhz
	2)  1200 Mhz
	3)  1050 Mhz
	4)   900 Mhz
	5)   800 Mhz
	6)   700 Mhz
	7)   600 Mhz
	8)   500 Mhz
	9)   400 Mhz
	10)  300 Mhz
	11)  200 Mhz
	12)  100 Mhz

	But 1200 Mhz can not be set on this machine.
	--
	# sysctl dev.cpu.0.freq=1200
	dev.cpu.0.freq:1201 -> 1201
	--
	
	 So, the powerd can not decrease clock speed from 1201 MHz to 1200MHz
	when cpu is in idle(As far as I think it is not effective on my note book actually).

	 Current powerd codes does not check current cpu freq after 
	calling set_freq function in powerd.c, so it can not recognize that
	cpu frequency has not been changed.
	 
	 FYI, I attached output of acpidump and sysctl commands:
	 
	 The output of acpidump -dt is cf-r7.asl.gz.

	 The output of sysctl -a is cf-r7-sysctl.txt.gz

Fix: I wrote the patch(powerd.c.set_freq.patch.gz) to 
         the powerd check the current frequency after calling set_freq 
	 function, and if cpu frequency has not been changed, 
	 try to change the cpu frequency with next frequency value.

	  Strictly speaking, It may be fixed by changing kernel codes, but
	 as far as I think that handling the problem with powerd  can be 
	 applyed to much more machines than changing kernel's cpu_freq codes.
	
	  Anyway, please see the following results of this patch:
	
--  Before applying the patch
powerd: using sysctl for AC line status
powerd: using devd for AC line status
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 1201 MHz to 1200 MHz
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 1201 MHz to 1200 MHz
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 1201 MHz to 1200 MHz
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 1201 MHz to 1200 MHz
total joules used: 25.000
--

--  After applying the patch
powerd: using sysctl for AC line status
powerd: using devd for AC line status
powerd: error setting CPU frequency 1200: Resource temporarily unavailable
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 1201 MHz to 1200 MHz
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 1201 MHz to 1050 MHz
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 1050 MHz to 900 MHz
idle time > 90%, decreasing clock speed from 900 MHz to 800 MHz
--

Please note that "error setting CPU frequency 1200: Resource temporarily 
unavailable" means 1200Mhz can not be set on the box.

Regards,
How-To-Repeat: 	Run powerd -v on CF-R7 note book(at least).
